subtitle: Senior Technology & Data Leader -- Professional Services Delivery | Data Function Ownership | HIPAA-Regulated Operating Depth
summary_text: Senior technology and data leader with two complementary credentials for this role. First: literal professional-services leadership -- founded and ran DMLCo for 17 years (full P&L, peak $4-5M revenue, 12 employees, dozens of client engagements). Second: data-function depth from fourteen years owning the data function end-to-end at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under HIPAA / PCI-DSS / CARD Act / CFPB regulatory regime, with production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation. Buyer-side vendor governance threads through both eras: SoW authorship, budget management, multi-year vendor relationships, and resource leveling across in-house, nearshore, and offshore teams.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing pre-sales technical advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under regulatory governance.

Owned buyer-side vendor governance across the full vendor lifecycle: SoW authorship and revision, vendor budget and burn-rate tracking, multi-year vendor relationship management, resource leveling across in-house / nearshore / offshore teams, and decisions on which functions to nearshore vs. keep in-house.

Led cross-functional data-definitions discipline across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- agreement on metric calculations, definitions, and the cross-team incentive conflicts that surface around them.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions across a 45-50 person delivery organization.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team.

Founded and scaled a web development and IT consulting firm over 17 years with full P&L ownership -- $4-5M peak revenue, 12 employees at peak, end-to-end responsibility for finance, client delivery, talent, and operations.

Built and sustained long-term client advisory relationships across dozens of accounts; grew primarily through referral, demonstrating executive trust-building and delivery reliability at professional-services margins.

Architected and launched a proprietary, commercial-grade content management platform serving dozens of client-facing digital properties; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: P&L Ownership, Services Portfolio, Client Advisory, Voice of Customer, Managing Other Managers, ePMO Governance, SoW Authorship, Vendor Budget Management
DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Data Governance, Power BI, Tableau, Cross-Functional Data Definitions
SQL / T-SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL -- DBA / SQL Architect origin
Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, Vendor Assessment
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
